summary: Tested HostelHub backend APIs and frontend routing/UI. 10/11 backend tests pass. All frontend routing tests pass. Login page renders correctly with Google sign-in and domain info. Dark mode toggle works.

critical.issue: Returns 404 — no root route defined in api_router. Feature spec says it should return 200.

issues: Google OAuth Client ID returns 403 from Google (GSI_LOGGER: The given client ID is not found) — expected in preview/demo env, not a code issue

action_items: Optional: Add a root GET /api/ route that returns 200 with basic health info (e.g., {"status": "ok", "app": "HostelHub"})
critical_code_review_comments: No root /api/ health endpoint defined — GET /api/ returns 404. All other tested endpoints work correctly.
Google OAuth GSI Client ID 403 in browser console (expected for preview env — not a production concern)
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed called during testing — creates 4 users, maintenance tickets, lost/found items, menus, ratings, complaints, issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend mostly healthy. Only missing route is GET /api/ (no root route). All auth-protected endpoints correctly return 401 without token. Student JWT (HS256) works for authenticated endpoints. Frontend routing redirects work correctly for all protected routes. Login page UI is clean with correct domain restriction cards and working dark mode toggle.
